global.description: The ad features a minimalist design with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save money with no hidden fees.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of overlapping circles and a rectangle in the center, rendered in a minimalist style.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: More abstract shapes, including a larger rectangle and circles, positioned centrally but slightly off to the side.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the bottom center, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Save with confidence No hidden fees' prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence No hidden fees

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The 'NovaPay' logo appears at the top left, featuring a modern font in black against the light gray background.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A black button with white text saying 'Book now' located at the bottom right, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, key elements include abstract shapes and clear messaging.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom right.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, No hidden fees, NovaPay, Book now
